summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AlphaAI Fund platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI functional with minor chart rendering warnings.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height rendering warnings in console
design_issues.details: Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1, but charts render correctly

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, stats, and features
Navigation works - all pages accessible (Dashboard, Agents, Marketplace, Analytics, Admin)
Connect Wallet button functions (demo wallet mode)
Dashboard page shows investor stats, portfolio allocation, performance chart
AI Agents page displays trading agents with status
AI Analysis feature runs and displays results
Analytics page shows performance metrics and charts
Admin dashboard shows risk alerts and trade logs
